tags.name: Kaduwela Road (New Kandy Road)
tags.note: Road declared in Gazette dated 06-06-1989 as B263-Malabe-Kaduwela Road Starting from Malabe Jct. and ending at Kaduwela Jct on AB10. No one may alter this trace unless redefined and issued in a new Gazette.

tags.name: Kaduwela Road (New Kandy Road)
tags.note: Road declared in Gazette 06-06-1989 as B240 Kotte-Bope Road. Starts at Diyatha Uyana Jct; runs via Malabe, Athurugiriya, Godagama and ends at Bope Jct. No one may alter this trace unless redefined and issued in a new Gazette.
